title: Software Update - DFU -  Complete screen
scenario: Verify the "Update Complete" screen with a 100% progress bar and success message is shown after a DFU software update finishes, and tapping "Close" returns to the home screen.
steps: Perform a DFU software update on the device.
Wait for the update process to complete.
Observe the screen displayed after the update finishes.
Check that a progress bar is shown at 100%.
Verify a message stating the software update for the device name has successfully updated.
Confirm that the user is returned to the home screen.
expected: The "Update Complete" screen is shown with a progress bar at 100% and a message stating the software update for the device name has successfully updated. Tapping "Close" returns the user to the home screen.
